arts.ttl: New details emerge of Ronald Araújo’s Barcelona release clause
arts.sum: It’s been almost a month since Uruguayan centre-back Ronald Araújo signed his new Barcelona contract, and plenty of talk has been had around his new release clause at the club.…

arts.ttl: Barca handed Tah boost as Bayern drop out of race
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund appears to have confirmed the club are no longer interested in signing Jonathan Tah this summer from Bayer Leverkusen. The news suggests it’s even more likely that Tah will head to Barcelona once his contract at Leverkusen expires in the summer.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona unveil squad to face Rayo Vallecano

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Liverpool handed huge £83m Barcelona boost in Alexander Isak pursuit?
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly not in a financial position to sign Newcastle United star Alexander Isak, boosting the hopes of Arsenal and Liverpool in landing the Swede.

Szczesny; Kounde, Cubarsí, Iñigo, Balde; De Jong, Pedri; Yamal, Olmo, Raphinha; Lewandowski Barça get some very good news for this one as captain Ronald Araujo makes it back in time from the ankle injury he suffered against Sevilla last weekend, and adds depth to a defense still missing Andreas Christensen due to a calf problem.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Rayo Vallecano – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Barcelona host Rayo Vallecano this evening knowing a win will take them back to the top of the La Liga table. Dropped points for Real Madrid and Atletico Madrid over the weekend has opened the door for Hansi Flick’s side to regain top spot. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Sporting Director confirms they are out of race for Barcelona target
arts.sum: Barcelona and Bayern Munich have been the two clubs most closely linked with Bayer Leverkusen central defender Jonathan Tah, who is out of contract at the end of the season. Able to sign a precontract, Tah is looking for a move in the summer, but Bayern are unlikely to be his destination.
